nl_query: What is the average final honorarium amount per board coordinator?
failed_sql:
SELECT b.id AS board_id, AVG(hs.final_amount) AS avg_final_honorarium_amount
FROM   board_coordinator bc
JOIN   faculty_cache     fc ON fc.employee_erp_id = bc.employee_id
JOIN   honorarium_summary hs ON hs.board_id = bc.board_id
WHERE  bc.effective_from <= CURRENT_DATE
  AND (bc.effective_to IS NULL OR bc.effective_to >= CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP  BY b.id
ORDER  BY avg_final_honorarium_amount DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): board_coordinator.employee_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
